title: Video gif. A little girl peeks out of an orange tube slide and waves before disappearing down the slide backwards and belly down with her hands in the air.
The Simpsons gif. Homer is frozen, standing very still, with a blank expression on his face. He slowly slides himself backwards into a bush to disappear and hide.
Disney gif. Mickey Mouse, in a bowler hat, red jacket and khaki pants, puts one hand on his hip and waves the other goodbye. Text, "Goodbye."
Bye Bye Goodbye GIF

Go Jimmy Fallon GIF by The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
Peace Dont Talk To Me GIF
waving bye bye GIF
Video gif. A man in wraparound sunglasses holds up a peace sign with two fingers, then says, "Peace," before turning to walk away.
Hand Hello GIF by Lucas
Movie gif. Zoey Deutch as Harper Moore in Set It Up smiles and says "byeeee" as she slides out of the frame.
Video gif. A person dressed to look like a green alien sits in a bathtub and smiles before pulling the shower curtain closed. Text, "K, bye."
Ice Cube Friday GIF
TV gif. Honey Boo Boo tilts her head and flutters her eyes as she looks to the side. She smiles smugly and waves her hand. Text, "Bye."
Celebrity gif. Dressed in a white robe, Marilyn Monroe leans on her elbow on a window sill and waves with her other hand high in the air, smiling. Text, "Bye bitch!"
TV gif. Seth Meyers at his desk on Late Night with Seth Meyers raises his eyebrows and waves a hand energetically at us, mouthing the words that appear as text below, "Okay Goodbye."
Illustrated gif. A simple drawing of a man leaning out his door waves and then slams the door behind him. Text, “Bye bye.”
See Ya Goodbye GIF by Pudgy Penguins
Reality TV gif. Nene Leakes on Real Housewives of Atlanta has large sunglasses that take up half her face. She makes a peace sign with her hands, and says, “Bye.” with an unamused expression.
Celebrity gif. With a bittersweet look, Jake Gyllenhaal touches his fingers to his lips, closes his hand into a fist, and walks away, disappearing into a room full of smoke.
Photo gif. A fluffy orange kitten has been edited to seem like it is waving its little paw goodbye. The words "Buh Bye!" are written in pink font.
Video gif. Two young men stand together. One holds up his fingers as if saying peace out and vanishes.
SpongeBob gif. Spongebob shoots finger guns with a sly grin, attempting to look cool as he backs out of the room.
Anime gif. Pikachu from Pokemon gives us a sad, meek wave. Text, "Goodbye."
Bye Bye Love GIF

TV gif. In a scene from At Home with Amy Sedaris, Justin Theroux as the sea captain slides away dramatically with an arm outstretched, while another outstretched arm in the foreground reaches out to him.
TV gif. D'Arcy Carden as Janet from The Good Place gives us an excited wave. Text, "Bye guys!"
Cartoon gif. Mona and Russel from Nanalan are standing in a garden and they look at the sky as they wave goodbye. Text, "Bye bye."
Movie gif. Rebel Wilson as Fat Amy in Pitch Perfect looks up awkwardly, shaking her head and saying a long drawn-out "byeeee."
See Ya Goodbye GIF by DINOSALLY

Movie gif. Margot Robbie as Barbie drives a pink convertible through the driveway past a pink movie theater, looking very friendly as she smiles and waves with both hands at everyone she's passing on the street.
The Office gif. Steve Carell as Michael Scott slowly turns with eyebrows raised and walks into his office.
Block Grandma GIF

Movie gif. Pocahontas is standing and raises one hand, giving a slow, heartfelt wave goodbye. Leaves flutter by and the sunset in the background has hues of pink and yellow, giving the scene a soft glow of warmth. The text on the bottom reads, "Bye Bitch."
